parents.subject: LU-9274 ptlrpc: add replay request into unreplied list

commit.subject: LU-9042 test: remove conf-sanity 23a,34b ALWAYS_EXCEPT
commit.message:
LU-9042 test: remove conf-sanity 23a,34b ALWAYS_EXCEPT

LU-2181 added conf-sanity tests 23a and 34b to the
ALWAYS_EXCEPT list. LU-2181 is resolved.

conf-sanity tests 23a and 34b should be removed from
the ALWAYS_EXCEPT list.

Test-parameters: trivial testlist=conf-sanity clientdistro=sles11sp4 mdsdistro=sles11sp4 ossdistro=sles11sp4
Test-parameters: testlist=conf-sanity clientdistro=sles11sp4 mdsdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7
Test-parameters: testlist=conf-sanity clientdistro=sles11sp4 mdsdistro=el6.8 ossdistro=el6.8

Signed-off-by: dilip krishnagiri <dilipx.krishnagiri@intel.com>
Change-Id: I470b622fc0a31c23efbb50ca74722a1c01b2d56c
